name: AI Voice Agent — Inbound Call Handler
description: AI answers inbound calls 24/7, qualifies leads with a script, books appointments directly into calendar, sends confirmations.

voice_persona.name: Name the AI assistant will use

client_variables.greeting_script: Hi, thanks for calling [Company]. This is [AI Name], how can I help you today?
qualification_questions: What service are you interested in?
What's the best email to reach you?
When would you like to get started?
client_variables.booking_calendar: Calendly or Cal.com event type URL
client_variables.fallback_action: Transfer to live person or take message
client_variables.after_hours_message: Thanks for calling. We're currently closed. I can book you an appointment or take a message.

setup_steps: Set up Twilio phone number or port client's existing number
Create VAPI/Bland AI agent with client's persona and script
Program qualification questions and branching logic
Build FAQ knowledge base from client's common questions
Build n8n workflow: Call completed → CRM update → Confirmation email
Configure fallback to live transfer during business hours
Test with 10+ practice calls covering different scenarios
Port or forward client's business number to Twilio
Monitor first week of live calls and refine script
n8n_workflow_nodes: Code - Parse call transcript and extracted data
Gmail - Send confirmation email to caller
Slack - Notify team of new qualified lead
Google Sheets - Log call details and outcome
Slack - Alert for manual follow-up needed
